titleStmt.title: SII 27.401: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 401. (A.R. No. 326 of 1931-32.) SURĀLA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 1) set up in the inner prākāra of Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.

This record, badly damaged in the beginning, registers a gift of land to god Mahādēva by Aṇṇa Kalukūra. Iśvari, daughter of Mudavariya Rāma was entrusted to fetch the rice to the temple. Bemmaṇañcha Toḷaha is referred to as one of the witnesses to the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
worn out
paḍuvalu paḍuvariya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
yiṁtī catusīmeya voḷaguḷa makiya gade
Āṟu yidaṟa [kūḍaṇa Ātana] maneyiṁda teṁka matta gade voṁdu Ā
tu mekemarisaha bituva bede gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu muḍe 9 Akṣara
dalū Āṟumūḍe gade yiṁtī catusīmeya voḷagaṇa Ānabha halasu
māu teṁgu yēnu Uḷaṁtha Anubheda voḷage Ā gadeyiṁda baṁda ma
ra teṁginamara 3 halasu 2 hoṟagāgi mēlāda bāḷu Anubhasahavā
gi mahādēvara Amrutapaḍige Āṁṇa kalukūramāḍida dhaṁma yi bā
ḷanu A yiṁdanubhavsi kālakālake naḍasuva Āki dēvarahāneya
li Aknimūḍe 9 Akṣaradalu voṁbhatu mūḍe Akkiyanu naḍasi ba
hanu yi voṁbhattu mūḍe Ākkiyanu mudavariya rāmana ma
gaḷu yisvari taṁdu mahadēvarige maleyakaḍi Ākkiyanu
parake naḍisibhahāvaḷeṁdu toḷaharu budhiṁbaṁdu Aṁṇa
kalukurarū du māḍikoṭṭa Ākki yi sāsanake toḷahara beṁ
(ṁ)maṇaṁcara Oppa śrīmahadēvaru kalukurana Oppa viṣṇuvi
na Oppa dānapālanayōrmadyē dānā śrēyōnupālanaṁ . dā
na svargamavāpnōtipālana Accutaṁpadaṁ
Digital edition of SII 27.401 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
